Westlaw Classic.description: Unified legal research — WestLaw Classic (institutional access), CourtListener (3,352 US courts), Congress.gov (legislation), Federal Register (regulations), eCFR (CFR full text), EUR-Lex (EU law), Taiwan Judicial Yuan, EU Compliance (GDPR/AI Act/DSA), OECD Tax Treaties, SEC EDGAR, Singapore eLitigation. 25 tools.

vaquill-legal.description: Vaquill AI — semantic search across 8M+ US federal/state court opinions, USC, and CFR

auslaw.description: AustLII — Australian case law and legislation with PDF OCR support

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, post updates to client or team channels.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive — structure diagrams, engagement letters, client files.

exa.description: Exa AI search — finds expert legal commentary, law firm publications, academic papers, regulatory news, and specialist articles across any language. Superior to generic web search for legal research.

fetch.description: Web content retrieval — reads any URL and converts to clean text. Use for government gazettes, regulatory announcements, OECD publications, law firm memos, and foreign-language legal sources.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured multi-step reasoning — use for complex legal analysis chains, multi-jurisdiction comparisons, and treaty network optimization where each step depends on prior conclusions.
